creator: bhargava.marreddy@broadcom.com
text:
(In reply to Prasad Krishnamurthy from comment #9)
Thank you, Prasad, for the log files.

Everything looks clean to me. Can you please provide more details.

1. Is this first time you are installing FreeBSD on that DELL host?
2. Did you see the issue just after the installation of  FreeBSD 11.1 
   (or) several days after the installation?
3. Is it possible for you to install yet another OS (like Linux) and see 
   if things work fine?
4. Is it possible for you to try back-to-back?

Thanks
